command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "cat > /tmp/check_ollama.py << 'PYEOF'
import json
with open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json') as f:
    c = json.load(f)
# Check auth/providers section for ollama base url
auth = c.get('auth', {})
providers = c.get('providers', {})
ollama_section = c.get('ollama', {})
print('auth keys:', list(auth.keys()))
print('providers keys:', list(providers.keys()))
print('ollama section:', json.dumps(ollama_section, indent=2))
# Also look at full config keys
print('top level keys:', list(c.keys()))
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/check_ollama.py"
